name: Framer

auth.notes: Framer Server API requires a project-bound API key generated from the project's Site Settings; scripts pass it to the framer-api connect call, commonly through FRAMER_API_KEY.

rateLimits: No public per-endpoint rate limits found; Server API is in open beta and FAQ says beta usage is free with future per-use pricing likely.
pagination: No general REST pagination model; official FAQ says Server API uses persistent streaming WebSockets, with REST only shown as an example wrapper.
notes: Official Framer docs cover the beta Server API, framer-api JavaScript package, Plugin API reference, llms.txt, and GitHub examples.
Official docs mention building an MCP server on top of the Server API, but no first-party MCP server/install documentation was found.
reviewReason: Keep in review: official Framer docs source the beta Server API/SDK and mention MCP as a possible use case, but do not publish a first-party MCP server or install surface; community directories disagree on whether a Framer MCP is official.
